debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
A : Finset ι
m : ℕ
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace Ω
μ : Measure Ω
inst✝² : IsFiniteMeasure μ
mE : MeasurableSpace E
inst✝¹ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝ : InnerProductSpace ℝ E
X : ι → Ω → E
iIndepFun_X : iIndepFun X μ
identDistrib_neg_X : ∀ (i : ι), IdentDistrib (X i) (-X i) μ μ
memLp_X : ∀ i ∈ A, MemLp (X i) (2 * ↑m) μ
this : DecidableEq ι
integrable_prod_norm_X : ∀ I ∈ piFinset fun x => A ×ˢ A, Integrable (fun ω => ∏ k, ‖X (I k).1 ω‖ * ‖X (I k).2 ω‖) μ
I : Fin m → ι × ι
hI : I ∈ piFinset fun x => A ×ˢ A
⊢ Integrable (fun ω => ∏ k, inner ℝ (X (I k).1 ω) (X (I k).2 ω)) μ

by
    refine' Integrable.of_norm _ _
    calc
      ∫⁻ ω, ‖∏ k, inner ℝ (X (I k).1 ω) (X (I k).2 ω)‖ ∂μ
        ≤ ∫⁻ ω, ∏ k, ‖inner ℝ (X (I k).1 ω) (X (I k).2 ω)‖ ∂μ := by
          simp_rw [norm_prod]
      _ ≤ ∫⁻ ω, ∏ k, ‖X (I k).1 ω‖ * ‖X (I k).2 ω‖ ∂μ := by
          apply lintegral_mono
          intro ω
          exact prod_le_prod (fun _ _ => by positivity) fun k _ => by
            exact (norm_inner_le_norm _ _).trans (by simp [mul_comm])
      _ < ∞ := by
        exact ENNReal.coe_ne_top.2 (integrable_prod_norm_X I hI).norm_integral_ne_top
